g.text: • SA node = primary pacemaker (60-100 bpm) • AV node delay ~0.1s allows atrial contraction before ventricular
• LV wall 3x thicker than RV (systemic vs pulmonary pressure) • Mitral valve = bicuspid (2 leaflets); all others = 3 leaflets
• LAD = "widow-maker" supplies anterior LV wall • Right-dominant circulation in ~85% of people (PDA from RCA)
